description_long: This object consists of four large, spherical yellow storage tanks arranged in a row on a rectangular gray platform. Each tank is supported by a circular metal framework at the base and is equipped with a prominent metal pipe assembly that arches over the top, likely for filling or venting. The tanks are interconnected by a network of pipes and structural supports, suggesting an industrial function such as storing gases or liquids. The surface of the tanks appears smooth and painted, with metallic structural elements providing reinforcement and access. The overall construction is robust, with visible ladders and platforms for maintenance access. The design is typical of storage facilities found in industrial or utility settings.
description: A row of four large, yellow spherical storage tanks with metal pipe assemblies and support frameworks on a gray platform, typical of industrial storage facilities.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four spherical tanks side by side, with pipe assemblies and support structures clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the tanks and the alignment of the pipe assemblies along the row.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the tanks and the supporting frameworks, with less detail on the pipe assemblies.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the sequence of tanks and the attached pipe structures from the other end.
